SEARCH

Uses of Package
common.dto

Packages that use common.dto
Package
Description
client.app
Client-side application scaffolding: screen navigation and the in-memory session.
client.net
Client networking: the persistent TCP connection to the server and the event bus that delivers server-pushed real-time updates.
client.service
Client service layer: a typed facade over the raw connection.
client.view
Client JavaFX controllers and view helpers — one controller per FXML screen (login, dashboard, reservations, gate, reports, approval queue, notifications, registration, …) plus shared UI utilities such as BaseController and Widgets.
common.dto
Serializable data transfer objects and enums shared by client and server.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.dao
Data access layer: one DAO per aggregate (auth, members, parks, reservations, visits, waiting list, notifications, reports, parameter-change requests).
server.net
Server networking: the OCSF-style TCP server that accepts client connections, tracks each ClientSession, routes incoming ClientRequests to the domain layer via RequestRouter, and reports lifecycle events through the ServerListener callback interface.
server.subscription
Real-time push registry: SubscriptionRegistry maps subscription keys (e.g.
  • Classes in common.dto used by client.app
    Class
    Description
    Role
    Staff role of a user row.
    UserDTO
    Immutable data transfer object representing an authenticated staff user.
    VisitorDTO
    Immutable data transfer object representing a visitor who logged in by national ID.
  • Classes in common.dto used by client.net
    Class
    Description
    ClientRequest
    Represents a request sent from the client to the server.
    ServerEvent
    A change notification pushed from the server to subscribed clients.
    ServerResponse
    Represents a response sent from the server to the client.
    SubscriptionKey
    Identifies a single subscribable resource on the server — the pair (entity name, numeric id) that a client wants change events for.
  • Classes in common.dto used by client.service
    Class
    Description
    ClientRequest
    Represents a request sent from the client to the server.
    ParamField
    The park parameter targeted by a parameter_change_request.
    RequestType
    Defines all request types that can be sent between client and server.
    ServerResponse
    Represents a response sent from the server to the client.
    VisitType
    The nature of a park visit booked on a ReservationDTO.
  • Classes in common.dto used by client.view
    Class
    Description
    CancellationsReportDTO
    Result of the Cancellations report: a per-day breakdown of cancelled and no-show reservations over a date range, optionally narrowed to one park, with range totals and a daily average.
    NotificationDTO
    Immutable data transfer object representing a notification row — a simulated/popup message addressed to exactly one recipient (a visitor or a staff user).
    ParameterChangeRequestDTO
    Immutable data transfer object representing a parameter_change_request row — the unit of the park-parameter approval workflow.
    ParamField
    The park parameter targeted by a parameter_change_request.
    ParkDTO
    Immutable data transfer object representing a park row.
    ReservationDTO
    Immutable data transfer object representing a single park reservation.
    ReservationStatus
    Lifecycle state of a ReservationDTO.
    ReservationUpdateResultDTO
    Result of a successful RequestType.UPDATE_RESERVATION: the freshly persisted ReservationDTO bundled with the price before and after the edit, so the client can settle the difference.
    ServerEvent
    A change notification pushed from the server to subscribed clients.
    ServerResponse
    Represents a response sent from the server to the client.
    SubscriptionKey
    Identifies a single subscribable resource on the server — the pair (entity name, numeric id) that a client wants change events for.
    VisitDTO
    Immutable data transfer object representing a single visit row — one party's actual entry into a park (by reservation or as a casual walk-in).
    VisitsReportDTO
    Result of the Visits-by-Type report: per-category visit counts and average stay lengths over a date range, optionally narrowed to one park.
    VisitType
    The nature of a park visit booked on a ReservationDTO.
    WaitlistEntryDTO
    Immutable data transfer object representing a single waiting-list entry — a visitor's queue position for a park/date that was full when they booked.
  • Classes in common.dto used by common.dto
    Class
    Description
    CancellationsReportRow
    One per-day row of the Cancellations report: how many reservations were cancelled and how many were marked no-show on a single calendar day.
    ChangeStatus
    Lifecycle status of a parameter_change_request.
    EventOp
    Kind of change carried by a ServerEvent on the realtime push channel.
    ParamField
    The park parameter targeted by a parameter_change_request.
    RequestType
    Defines all request types that can be sent between client and server.
    ReservationDTO
    Immutable data transfer object representing a single park reservation.
    ReservationStatus
    Lifecycle state of a ReservationDTO.
    Role
    Staff role of a user row.
    ServerEvent
    A change notification pushed from the server to subscribed clients.
    VisitsReportRow
    One grouped row of the Visits-by-Type report: the aggregate figures for a single visitor category over the report's date range and park filter.
    VisitType
    The nature of a park visit booked on a ReservationDTO.
